content:
![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/tumblr/tumblr_ks4sbcgn4X1qzwi7fo1_r1_400.jpg)

Got an MRI for the first time today.

Whatever "signal of intensity" and "marginal thickening" means, it causes me pain in the shoulder. Need to go meet the doctor one more time to see whether or not I need to have an operation. Hehe ...
